name: team-trophy-shelf-01
title: Team Trophy Shelf
author: ilinxa
description: A durable gallery of a team's earned milestone badges, with honest locked slots for what's ahead, an optional header count, an awarded-date tooltip, and a brief (<1s), skippable, non-blocking reveal when a badge is newly earned (diff-driven, SSR-safe, reduced-motion-aware). Ships shadcn-style: a batteries-included <TeamTrophyShelf01> plus a headless <TeamTrophyShelfRoot> + flat parts (Grid, Header, Empty) + the standalone Tier-C <TeamMilestoneBadge> token + a React.lazy <BadgeAwardOverlay>, so the bare token falls out for free and animateAward=false / the bare-token path never load the award chunk. D-16: a host routing badge events to team-feedback-loop-01 sets animateAward=false so the moment isn't celebrated twice. Cooperative and team-scoped: team-owned badges only — no ranking, no per-member split, no public surface. Portable — zero next/*, SSR-safe, imports no other registry component. Second component of the gamification-system.
